etimesStunning reunion story: Man missing since 2001 finds biological father through DNA testA Chinese man, missing since childhood, has been reunited with his biological father after over two decades. Separated at a railway station in 2001, he was adopted by a Canadian family but faced a difficult upbringing. His search, aided by a volunteer organization, led to an emotional reunion in China, though his mother remains uncontacted.

etimesUPSC rank 301 turns into a mystery as two candidates named Akanksha Singh claim itA unique controversy has emerged from the UPSC Civil Services Examination results. Two candidates named Akanksha Singh are claiming the same rank, 301. One claimant is from Bihar, the granddaughter of Brahmeshwar Singh. The other claimant is from Uttar Pradesh, alleging impersonation. An admit card circulating online has added to the confusion.

etimesFrom superbikes to 8 crore garage: How rich is UK07 Rider? Inside YouTuber Anurag Dobhal’s net worthMoto vlogger Anurag Dobhal, known as UK07 Rider, recently shared personal struggles, sparking widespread discussion. His journey began with motorcycle vlogs, building a loyal fanbase called 'Brosena'. Reports estimate his net worth between Rs 20-25 crore, primarily from digital content creation, brand deals, and merchandise. His impressive collection of superbikes and luxury cars also contributes to his public image.
